brand_identity.name: Swim Club Nautica
brand_identity.description: A high-performance swimming club platform that feels like a luxury sports car dashboard. Dark, sleek, with neon accents.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-primary/90 hover:scale-105 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 uppercase tracking-wider

cards.feature: group relative overflow-hidden bg-surface border border-white/5 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors p-8
cards.pricing: bg-surface_highlight border border-white/10 p-10 hover:-translate-y-2 transition-transform duration-300

inputs.default: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 px-0 py-3 rounded-none placeholder:text-white/30

landing_page.hero: Full-screen video/image background (hero_background). Large centered typography 'SWIM CLUB NAUTICA' in Barlow Condensed. Subtext in Manrope. CTA 'JOIN THE CLUB' in Neon Lime.
landing_page.benefits: Bento grid layout. Dark cards with neon icons. High contrast.
landing_page.coaches: Carousel or grid. Black & White photos with neon hover effects.
landing_page.locations: Mapbox integration. Dark mode map style.

admin_dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (left). Top bar with quick actions. Main content area with high-density data grids.
admin_dashboard.widgets: KPI cards with sparklines. 'Terminator' style thin borders.
admin_dashboard.tables: Zebra striping (very subtle: bg-white/5). Sticky headers.

user_portal.layout: Card-based layout. Personal stats prominently displayed.
user_portal.qr_code: Central feature. Easy access for check-in.

universal_guidelines.design_philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King. Zoom In. Negative Space. Contrast.
universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure text contrast >= 4.5:1. Use ARIA labels. Support keyboard navigation.
universal_guidelines.motion: Use framer-motion for smooth transitions. Staggered entrance animations for lists. Micro-interactions on hover.

tech_stack_instructions.tailwind: Extend theme with custom colors (primary: #CCFF00, background: #050505). Add 'Barlow Condensed' and 'Manrope' to font family.
tech_stack_instructions.shadcn: Customize base components. Remove default border-radius if too round. darken backgrounds.
tech_stack_instructions.icons: Use Lucide React (default) or Phosphor Icons for a more technical look.
